items.title: S01E01 - Your Body Is an Instrument
items.summary: Farkus Faffner plans to auction off Faffner Hall's collection of musical instruments. The late Fughetta Faffner, a distant relative of Farkas and the founder of the hall, is horrified when she learns of Farkas' plans. The residents of the hall, including Riff, Mimi, the Wild Impresario and the ghost of Fughetta, attempt to teach Farkas that instruments are worth more than their monetary value.

infolabels.title: Your Body Is an Instrument
infolabels.plot: Farkus Faffner plans to auction off Faffner Hall's collection of musical instruments. The late Fughetta Faffner, a distant relative of Farkas and the founder of the hall, is horrified when she learns of Farkas' plans. The residents of the hall, including Riff, Mimi, the Wild Impresario and the ghost of Fughetta, attempt to teach Farkas that instruments are worth more than their monetary value.

items.title: S01E02 - Delighting in Sounds
items.summary: Faffner Hall is holding a "Festival of Sounds", and the Wild Impresario is trying to find a sound to top the bill. He gets a note in the mail from his old girlfriend Zola of his from his days in the Wild Bunch. Zola says in her note that she is coming to see Wild. Meanwhile, Farkus Faffner plans to blow up Faffner Hall where he will blame its residents and claim the insurance money.

Meanwhile, Farkus Faffner plans to blow up Faffner Hall where he will blame its residents and claim the insurance money.

items.title: S01E03 - Sounds Become Music
items.summary: When an infant alien lands in Faffner Hall, Farkus comes up with a plan to become rich while Fughetta and Mimi discover that the alien needs music.

infolabels.title: Sounds Become Music
infolabels.plot: When an infant alien lands in Faffner Hall, Farkus comes up with a plan to become rich while Fughetta and Mimi discover that the alien needs music.

items.title: S01E04 - Music Is More Than Technique
items.summary: Mimi informs Riff that the violinist virtuoso Piganini has booked a recording studio in town and plan to ask him to perform at Faffner Hall.

infolabels.title: Music Is More Than Technique
infolabels.plot: Mimi informs Riff that the violinist virtuoso Piganini has booked a recording studio in town and plan to ask him to perform at Faffner Hall.

items.title: S01E05 - The Voice Is an Instrument
items.summary: Farkus Faffner enlists a zookeeper as his business partner where he sells Faffner Hall to the zookeeper so that he can turn it into a zoo.

infolabels.title: The Voice Is an Instrument
infolabels.plot: Farkus Faffner enlists a zookeeper as his business partner where he sells Faffner Hall to the zookeeper so that he can turn it into a zoo.

items.title: S01E06 - Reacting to Sounds
items.summary: Fughetta Faffner does her half-century sound check around Faffner Hall where she must make sure that there is one ghost in Faffner Hall according to Page 17 Paragraph 4C of the "Rules of the Dead." Fughetta soon starts to hear the voice of J.J. Ready (who invented the cash register in 1877)

infolabels.title: Reacting to Sounds

Fughetta soon starts to hear the voice of J.J. Ready (who invented the cash register in 1877)

items.title: S01E07 - If You Can Play, It's an Instrument
items.summary: Mimi discovers that a guy had broken the obo record by playing the longest note while on a tightrope. The original record holder was Fughetta's cousin Finkel back in 1853. Meanwhile, Farkus Faffner plans to use the instruments as scrap metal.

infolabels.title: If You Can Play, It's an Instrument
infolabels.plot: Mimi discovers that a guy had broken the obo record by playing the longest note while on a tightrope. The original record holder was Fughetta's cousin Finkel back in 1853. Meanwhile, Farkus Faffner plans to use the instruments as scrap metal.

items.title: S01E08 - Improvised Music
items.summary: A TV crew is coming to Faffner Hall for a special on the building; the regular residents hope it makes for good publicity. However, Farkas Faffner has another scheme: he wants to turn the hall into an amusement park!

infolabels.title: Improvised Music
infolabels.plot: A TV crew is coming to Faffner Hall for a special on the building; the regular residents hope it makes for good publicity. However, Farkas Faffner has another scheme: he wants to turn the hall into an amusement park!

items.title: S01E09 - Notation The Sign That Gets the Sound
items.summary: Guest Spot: James Taylor performs with the Wild Impresario.

infolabels.title: Notation The Sign That Gets the Sound
infolabels.plot: Guest Spot: James Taylor performs with the Wild Impresario.

items.title: S01E10 - Discovering New Sounds
items.summary: Guest Spot: Thomas Dolby demonstrates the sounds that you can make with a synthesizer. Patrick Moraz is the other musical guest.

infolabels.title: Discovering New Sounds
infolabels.plot: Guest Spot: Thomas Dolby demonstrates the sounds that you can make with a synthesizer. Patrick Moraz is the other musical guest.

items.title: S01E11 - Music Brings Us Together
items.summary: Using a talking skull (a recycled version of Yorick the Skull from The Muppet Show), Farkus Faffner traps Fughetta Faffner in her solidified state and traps her as part of his haunted house plot. Mimi, Riff, and Wild Impresario end up summoning Fughetta's Great Uncle Fishknife for help.

infolabels.title: Music Brings Us Together

items.title: S01E12 - The Power of Music
items.summary: A ghost exterminator named Madame Mumu (a recycled version of the Geri and the Atrics piano player from The Muppet Show) arrives at Faffner Hall where Farkus enlists her to get rid of Fughetta at the time when Farkus has a cold.

items.title: S01E13 - Anyone Can Make Music
items.summary: Guest Spot: Michala Petri and Robin Williamson appear in this episode.
